data.body: Fix implemented: moved claude plugin install out of the '[ -z $plugin_root ]' guard in detect_dso_plugin_root. Now runs unconditionally from project_dir with --scope project whenever claude CLI is available, so fresh projects get their own enabled plugin registration regardless of stale marketplace files. Also fixed Bug #1 mktemp regression under restricted test PATH by using a path under project_dir for detect output. RED test test_detect_dso_plugin_root_registers_plugin_even_when_probe_matches now GREEN (captures claude CLI invocation with correct argv and cwd). Full regression: 56/56 test-create-dso-app, 3/3 Bug1, 79/79 dso-setup, 8/8 Bug2.
